body.title: Igor posts ESCALATION_NEEDED to CC when stuck
body.result: ESCALATION_NEEDED posted at attempt 2+ in pe_close_loop. Structured message: ticket_id, attempt/max, file, error, plan. Tests green.
body.description: D316/D317: when HYPOTHESIZE validation fails 2+ times on same ticket, Igor posts ESCALATION_NEEDED to CC channel with basket dump (ticket_id, plan_summary, hypothesis_error, files_attempted). Makes autonomous M-ticket work safe — fails gracefully and asks for help rather than silently abandoning. Prerequisite for expanding Igor to M tickets.
